positive: Minimalist line art portrait of a whimsical woodland creature, perhaps a fox or a fox-like spirit, sitting amidst stylized autumnal flora and giant toadstools. The style should be elegant, clean, and high-contrast, reminiscent of engraved etchings or sophisticated Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints, rendered with crisp linework and negative space. Focus on a striking, symmetrical composition suitable for a central chest print on apparel. Utilize a limited, natural palette of muted ochre, slate blue, deep forest green, and creamy cream. Strong backlighting should create distinct silhouettes and maximize visual impact. Highly detailed, vectors feel, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, photographic, photo-realistic, 3d render, messy, busy background, gradients
